daily_summary.headline: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight and Falcon Heavy Lead the Day

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: Demonstration Flight for Russia's new Soyuz-5 launch vehicle, with a mass simulator on board.
top_events.action: Watch live for a historic demonstration of new capabilities.

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3
top_events.description: Launch of ViaSat-3 F3 satellite for high-speed internet services.
top_events.action: Catch the live stream of this significant satellite deployment.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 storm level aurora visible at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check conditions for possible aurora sightings at high latitudes.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
